code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut result = ""
mut current = ""
mut first_word = true

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b <= 32
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      let fb = match string.byte_at(current, 0)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      mut word = current
      if fb >= 97 and fb <= 122
        let upper = string.from_byte(fb - 32)
        let rest = string.substring(current, 1, string.len(current))
        word = "#{upper}#{rest}"
      end
      if first_word
        result = word
        first_word = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{word}"
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  let fb2 = match string.byte_at(current, 0)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  mut word2 = current
  if fb2 >= 97 and fb2 <= 122
    let upper2 = string.from_byte(fb2 - 32)
    let rest2 = string.substring(current, 1, string.len(current))
    word2 = "#{upper2}#{rest2}"
  end
  if first_word
    result = word2
  else
    result = "#{result} #{word2}"
  end
end

println(result)
